name: Smile - Pop'n
description:
Smile was an odd young man - not only invisible, but silly. He wore bandages, just to keep himself visible, as he often turned more invisible whenever he was especially happy.

And while he was a bit silly, and mischievous, he was also rather innocent, with many childish interests. Not exactly what you'd expect for the guitarist of Deuil.
creator: -H4UNT1NG-D3AD-
